review: Open the PWA first and paste the token if prompted.
Use the install checklist if you are testing on iPhone Safari.
Review #18, #19, #20, #21, and #25 evidence before approving implementation quality.
For #21, open Jobs, tap a job card, then check Steps, Logs, and Artifacts tabs.
For #25, verify this hub is generated from deliverables.json and local links pass the generator check.
For #27, verify builders stop at Validating and validators move passing work to Review.
For #28, verify validation.json, builder-report.md, validation-report.md, and validator-run evidence.
For #29, verify Claude Code is registered at 25% and forced Claude dispatch uses Sonnet 4.6.
